HOME.TITLE: IPTVnator
HOME.SUBTITLE: Please select a playlist from the list or add a new playlist

PLAYLISTS.WELCOME_DESCRIPTION: Start your streaming journey by adding your first playlist. Connect to your favorite IPTV service and enjoy live TV, movies, and series.
PLAYLISTS.FEATURE_M3U_LABEL: Add an M3U file or URL
PLAYLISTS.DASHBOARD_WELCOME_TAGLINE: Your IPTV library, in one place.
PLAYLISTS.DASHBOARD_WELCOME_DESCRIPTION: Connect M3U files, Xtream Codes, or Stalker portals — then enjoy live TV, movies and series on every screen.
PLAYLISTS.FEATURE_LIVE_DESC: Stream live channels with full schedule.
PLAYLISTS.FEATURE_VOD_DESC: On-demand library with covers and details.
PLAYLISTS.FEATURE_OFFLINE_DESC: Save movies and episodes for later.
PLAYLISTS.SOURCES_WELCOME_BODY: Pick a source type below to get started.
PLAYLISTS.SOURCE_M3U_NEEDS: Local file or URL pointing to an M3U/M3U8 playlist.
PLAYLISTS.SOURCE_XTREAM_NEEDS: Username, password and server URL from your provider.
PLAYLISTS.NO_RESULTS_DESCRIPTION: No playlists match your search. Try adjusting your search terms or clear the filter to see all playlists.

INFO_DIALOG.TITLE: Title
INFO_DIALOG.AUTO_UPDATE_DESCRIPTION: If the auto-refresh function is activated, the playlist will be updated automatically each time the app is started.
INFO_DIALOG.CUSTOM_USER_AGENT: Some IPTV providers need a specific user-agent in order to play their playlist.

REMOVE_DIALOG.TITLE: Remove playlist
REMOVE_DIALOG.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist completely?

REFRESH_XTREAM_DIALOG.TITLE: Refresh Xtream Playlist
REFRESH_XTREAM_DIALOG.MESSAGE: This will delete the local Xtream cache and re-import categories and streams from the remote server. Favorites, recently viewed items, hidden category visibility, and playback progress are restored after a successful re-import when matching content still exists. If the server cannot be reached, the restore remains pending until a later successful refresh. Continue?
REFRESH_XTREAM_DIALOG.ERROR: Failed to refresh playlist. Please try again.

PLAYLISTS.GLOBAL_FAVORITES_DESCRIPTION: Auto-generated playlist with aggregated favorites from all playlists
PLAYLISTS.PLAYLIST_UPDATE_SUCCESS: Success! The playlist was successfully updated.
PLAYLISTS.PLAYLIST_UPDATE_FILE_NOT_FOUND: Playlist refresh failed. The local file is no longer available. Check the file path or re-import the playlist.
PLAYLISTS.PLAYLIST_UPDATE_FILE_ACCESS_ERROR: Playlist refresh failed. The app can no longer access the local file.
PLAYLISTS.AUTO_REFRESH_UPDATE_SUCCESS: Success! The playlists were successfully updated

FILE_UPLOAD.REJECTED: File was rejected, unsupported file format {{filename}}.

URL_UPLOAD.CORS_NOTE: Note: In order to avoid CORS issues at this point the application uses a public CORS Proxy service. If you want to upload a playlist with sensitive data, it's more secure to import it from a file.
URL_UPLOAD.ERROR_FETCH_FAILED: Failed to fetch the playlist. Please check the URL and try again.
URL_UPLOAD.ERROR_403: Access denied (403): The server refused the request. The URL may require authentication or the playlist is restricted.
URL_UPLOAD.ERROR_404: Playlist not found (404): The URL does not point to a valid playlist. Please check the URL.
URL_UPLOAD.ERROR_401: Unauthorized (401): Authentication is required to access this playlist.

XTREAM_PLAYLIST.TITLE: Playlist title
XTREAM_PLAYLIST.URL_VALIDATION_ERROR: Should be a valid url with protocol (e.g. http://example.com or https://example.com:4324)

STALKER_PORTAL.TITLE: Title
STALKER_PORTAL.SERIAL_NUMBER_HINT: Use if already registered with provider
STALKER_PORTAL.DEVICE_ID_HINT: 64 hex characters - use if provider requires specific device ID
STALKER_PORTAL.SIGNATURE_HINT: 64 hex characters - use if provider requires device verification signatures
STALKER_PORTAL.URL_VALIDATION_ERROR: Should be a valid url with protocol (e.g. http://example.com/c or https://example.com/stalker_portal/c)

HOME.PARSING_ERROR: Error: Parsing failed, not a valid playlist:

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.GENERAL_SUBTITLE: Change the configuration of the application
SETTINGS.EPG_SOURCES_DESCRIPTION: Add one or more URLs as EPG sources
SETTINGS.EPG_EMPTY_HINT: Add a URL to fetch program data for your channels.
SETTINGS.PREFER_UPLOADED_EPG_TITLE: Prefer your EPG sources for Xtream playlists
SETTINGS.PREFER_UPLOADED_EPG_HINT: By default, Xtream playlists use the program guide from your provider, and your uploaded EPG only fills missing channels. Turn this on to use your uploaded EPG first instead.
SETTINGS.BACKUP_DESCRIPTION: Export your library as a snapshot, or restore from a previous backup.
SETTINGS.RESET_DESCRIPTION: Permanently delete content stored in this app.
SETTINGS.HERO_DESCRIPTION: Tune playback, guides, remote access and data handling from one place without losing the current workspace style.
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Change the configuration of the application
SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Please adapt the options from the list below and confirm with the save changes button
SETTINGS.NEW_VERSION_AVAILABLE: There is a new version available
SETTINGS.LATEST_VERSION: You are using the latest version
SETTINGS.OPEN_EXTERNAL_PLAYER_ON_DOUBLE_CLICK_DES: Require a double-click on channel rows before MPV or VLC playback starts.
SETTINGS.SHOW_DASHBOARD_DESCRIPTION: Keep Dashboard available in the workspace rail. When disabled, Sources becomes the first workspace page.

CLEAR_EPG_DIALOG.TITLE: Clear EPG data
CLEAR_EPG_DIALOG.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to remove all EPG (Electronic Program Guide) data from the database? This will delete all cached program schedules.

SETTINGS.EPG_DATA_CLEAR_FAILED: Failed to clear EPG data. Please try again.
SETTINGS.EPG_URL_ERROR: The value is not a valid URL
SETTINGS.THEME_DESCRIPTION: Select visual theme of the application
SETTINGS.COVER_SIZE_DESCRIPTION: Adjust the size of poster cards across grids and rails. Larger sizes are easier to see on TVs; smaller sizes show more content per row on big monitors.
SETTINGS.STARTUP_BEHAVIOR_DESCRIPTION: Choose whether IPTVnator opens the first available workspace view or restores your last section-level view. First view means Dashboard when enabled, otherwise Sources.
SETTINGS.SHOW_CAPTIONS_DESCRIPTION: Show or hide subtitles by default
SETTINGS.SHOW_EXTERNAL_PLAYBACK_BAR_DESCRIPTION: Keep the external-player status bar visible at the bottom of the workspace on desktop.
SETTINGS.ABOUT_SUBTITLE: Version, project links and ways to support IPTVnator.
SETTINGS.EMBEDDED_MPV_NOTICE_DESCRIPTION: macOS builds can include bundled libmpv and FFmpeg libraries for the experimental Embedded MPV player. Users do not need to install the MPV app separately; external MPV and VLC remain available as fallback players.
SETTINGS.COMMUNITY_DESCRIPTION: Star the repository, read the blog or join the Telegram group for updates and help.
SETTINGS.LINK_GITHUB_DESCRIPTION: Star the repo, open an issue or contribute
SETTINGS.LINK_BLOG_DESCRIPTION: Release notes, tips and project updates
SETTINGS.SUPPORT_DESCRIPTION: IPTVnator is free and open source, built in the open. If it is part of your daily routine, a small contribution helps keep the project alive and shape what comes next — thank you.
SETTINGS.EPG_NOTE: Currently EPG is available only in the electron-based version of IPTVnator.
SETTINGS.IMPORT_EXPORT_DATA_DESCRIPTION: Export or restore playlist backups including M3U snapshots, Xtream/Stalker connection metadata, user state, and EPG source URLs.
SETTINGS.REMOVE_ALL: Delete all playlists and playlist data
SETTINGS.REMOVE_ALL_DESCRIPTION: Delete every M3U, Xtream, and Stalker playlist stored in the app.

REMOVE_DIALOG.TITLE: Delete all playlists?
REMOVE_DIALOG.MESSAGE: Delete all {{count}} playlists from the app. This also removes stored playlist data on this device.
REMOVE_DIALOG.CONSEQUENCE_DOWNLOADS: Download history entries linked to those playlists
REMOVE_DIALOG.CONSEQUENCE_XTREAM_CACHE: Imported Xtream categories and locally cached content
REMOVE_DIALOG.BACKUP_HINT: Use Export first if you want a restorable backup before deleting.

SETTINGS.IMPORT_ERROR: Import error, please try with another file.
SETTINGS.PLAYLISTS_REMOVED: All playlists and playlist data were removed.
SETTINGS.MPV_PLAYER_PATH_DESCRIPTION: Set path to mpv player in your system. It will use the provided path to a mpv binary instead of using the one found in $PATH.
SETTINGS.MPV_REUSE_INSTANCE_DESCRIPTION: When enabled, the same MPV window will be reused for playing different streams. When disabled, each stream opens in a new MPV window.
SETTINGS.RECORDING_FOLDER_DESCRIPTION: Folder for live stream recordings from Embedded MPV. Leave empty to use the system Downloads folder.
SETTINGS.VLC_PLAYER_PATH_DESCRIPTION: Set path to VLC player in your system. It will use the provided path to a VLC binary instead of the default path for our system.
SETTINGS.VLC_REUSE_INSTANCE_DESCRIPTION: When enabled, the same VLC window will be reused for playing different streams. When disabled, each stream opens in a new VLC window.
SETTINGS.REMOTE_CONTROL_DESCRIPTION: Enable remote control of the application.
SETTINGS.REMOTE_CONTROL_PORT_DESCRIPTION: Port used for remote control of the application. Port 8765 is used by default.
SETTINGS.REMOTE_CONTROL_URL_DESCRIPTION: Access the remote control from another device on the same network.
SETTINGS.PLAYLISTS_REMOVE_FAILED: Could not delete playlists. Please try again.

CHANNELS.MANAGE_GROUPS_HINT: Use manage groups to show groups again.
CHANNELS.USE_STAR_TO_FAVORITE: Please use 'star' icon to add channels to your favorites.
CHANNELS.SELECT_CHANNEL_PLAYBACK: Please select a channel to start playback

DETAILS_DIALOG.TITLE: Channel details
DETAILS_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Read-only metadata parsed from the playlist file.
DETAILS_DIALOG.NAME: Name

EPG.TITLE: Electronic Program Guide
EPG.TIMESHIFT_AVAILABLE: Timeshift is available, click to play
EPG.ARCHIVE_PLAYBACK_UNAVAILABLE_DESCRIPTION: This provider exposes schedule history for the channel, but does not expose playable archive/catch-up playback.
EPG.NO_GUIDE_HINT: Try a different date or refresh the playlist.
EPG.EPG_NOT_AVAILABLE_CHANNEL_TITLE: Ooops, EPG is not available for this channel.
EPG.EPG_NOT_AVAILABLE_CHANNEL_DESCRIPTION: Please add/change the URL of the EPG list in the settings of the app.
EPG.ERROR: Ooops, EPG could not be loaded.
EPG.UP_TO_DATE: EPG is up-to-date, no sync needed

ABOUT.TITLE: About IPTVnator
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Cross-platform IPTV player application with multiple features, such as support of m3u and m3u8 playlists, favorites, TV guide, TV archive/catchup and more.

DETAIL_FALLBACK.NOTE: Extended metadata was not provided by this portal.

IMPORT_CANCELLED.TITLE: Import cancelled
IMPORT_CANCELLED.DESCRIPTION: The playlist import was cancelled. Retry when you want to continue loading this source.

ACCOUNT_EXPIRED.TITLE: Account expired
ACCOUNT_EXPIRED.DESCRIPTION: This account has been expired. Please check the credentials in playlist settings or remove it.

ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.TITLE: Account inactive
ACCOUNT_INACTIVE.DESCRIPTION: This account is inactive. Please check the credentials in playlist settings or remove it.

UNAUTHORIZED.TITLE: Unauthorized
UNAUTHORIZED.DESCRIPTION: Please check the credentials in playlist settings or remove it.

NOT_FOUND.TITLE: Portal not found
NOT_FOUND.DESCRIPTION: Please check the credentials and portal url in playlist settings or remove it.

PORTAL_UNAVAILABLE.TITLE: Portal unavailable
PORTAL_UNAVAILABLE.DESCRIPTION: The portal could not be reached. Check the server URL or retry when the source is available again.

EMPTY_CATEGORY.TITLE: No content in this category
EMPTY_CATEGORY.DESCRIPTION: Select another category or switch the content type.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.TITLE: Something went wrong
UNKNOWN_ERROR.DESCRIPTION: Unknown error, please try again later

NO_CATEGORY_SELECTED.TITLE: No category selected
NO_CATEGORY_SELECTED.DESCRIPTION: Please select a category to see the content

EMPTY_LIST_VIEW.TITLE: No results found
EMPTY_LIST_VIEW.NO_SEARCH_RESULTS: Nothing found, try to change your search request.

SEARCH_VIEW.INITIAL_DESCRIPTION: Enter at least 3 characters to search across live TV, movies and series.
SEARCH_VIEW.XTREAM_ONLY_NOTE: Global search is currently available for Xtream playlists only.

PORTALS.CONTENT_NOT_AVAILABLE: This content is not available on this server

DOWNLOADS.TITLE: Downloads
DOWNLOADS.EMPTY_HINT: Download movies and episodes to watch offline
DOWNLOADS.NO_PLAYLISTS_TITLE: Add a playlist to start downloading
DOWNLOADS.NO_PLAYLISTS_BODY: Once you add a playlist, you can save movies and episodes here for offline playback.
DOWNLOADS.NO_ITEMS_BODY: Use the download button on any movie or episode to save it for offline playback.
DOWNLOADS.NO_FILTER_MATCH: No downloads match the current filter
DOWNLOADS.DESKTOP_ONLY: This feature is only available in the desktop app

CLEAR_COMPLETED_DIALOG.TITLE: Clear completed downloads
CLEAR_COMPLETED_DIALOG.MESSAGE: This removes completed, failed, and canceled entries from the current downloads view. It does not delete any files that were already downloaded to disk.

DOWNLOADS.SOURCE_PLAYLIST_MISSING: This download can no longer open in the library because its source playlist was removed.
DOWNLOADS.FILE_NOT_FOUND: This downloaded file is no longer available on disk.
DOWNLOADS.FILE_ACTION_ERROR: The file action could not be completed.
DOWNLOADS.URL_COPY_FAILED: Failed to copy URL to clipboard

DASHBOARD.NO_HISTORY: No items found for this filter.
DASHBOARD.NO_HISTORY_HINT: Your watching history will appear here once you start playing content from your playlists.

SHELL.CLEAR_COMPLETED_DOWNLOADS_ALL_ARIA: Clear completed downloads for all playlists
SHELL.CLEAR_COMPLETED_DOWNLOADS_THIS_PLAYLIST_: Clear completed downloads for this playlist
SHELL.CLEAR_RECENTLY_VIEWED_SECTION_ARIA: Clear recently viewed for this section
SHELL.CLEAR_RECENTLY_VIEWED_DIALOG_MESSAGE_PLA: All {{type}} items from this playlist will be removed from your recently viewed history. This action cannot be undone.
SHELL.CLEAR_RECENTLY_VIEWED_DIALOG_MESSAGE_ALL: All {{type}} items across all playlists will be removed from your recently viewed history. This action cannot be undone.
SHELL.CLEAR_FAVORITES_DIALOG_MESSAGE_PLAYLIST: All {{type}} favorites from this playlist will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
SHELL.CLEAR_FAVORITES_DIALOG_MESSAGE_ALL: All {{type}} favorites across all playlists will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
SHELL.DROP_OVERLAY_BODY: Release an .m3u or .m3u8 file anywhere in the workspace to import it.
SHELL.DROP_OVERLAY_REJECTED_BODY: Please drop an .m3u or .m3u8 file. Press Esc to dismiss.
SHELL.XTREAM_IMPORT_DETAIL_LOCAL: Preparing faster playlist switching for the next visit.
SHELL.XTREAM_IMPORT_RESTORING_RECENT: Restoring recently viewed from local library...

COMMANDS.ADD_PLAYLIST_M3U_DESCRIPTION: Open add dialog on the M3U file or URL tab
COMMANDS.ADD_PLAYLIST_XTREAM_DESCRIPTION: Open add dialog on the Xtream Codes tab
COMMANDS.ADD_PLAYLIST_STALKER_DESCRIPTION: Open add dialog on the Stalker Portal tab
COMMANDS.CLEAR_CURRENT_VIEW_DESCRIPTION: Clear all visible {{type}} items in this view
COMMANDS.SWITCH_PLAYER_DESCRIPTION: Set {{name}} as the active video player

SHELL.XTREAM_REFRESH_DETAIL_LOCAL: Keeping favorites, watch history, hidden categories, and playback progress ready for restore after sync.

CONTEXT.LOAD_CATEGORIES_ERROR_HINT: Please retry or verify portal settings.

GLOBAL_FAVORITES.TITLE: Global Favorites
GLOBAL_FAVORITES.SUBTITLE: Live TV from all playlists
GLOBAL_FAVORITES.EMPTY_HINT: Star live channels from M3U, Xtream, or Stalker playlists to see them here.
GLOBAL_FAVORITES.EMPTY_PLAYER: Select a channel to start watching
GLOBAL_FAVORITES.NO_PLAYLISTS_BODY: Add a playlist to start collecting favorites from live channels, movies, and series.
GLOBAL_FAVORITES.NO_ITEMS_BODY: Tap the star icon on any channel, movie, or series to save it here.

GLOBAL_RECENT.NO_PLAYLISTS_BODY: Add a playlist and your watching history will appear here.
GLOBAL_RECENT.NO_ITEMS_BODY: Start watching anything from your library and it will show up here.
